历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7161 → 9343 → 9378 → 9429 → 13112, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 3700 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 13112. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category was 80 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 82 in 2025. In 2026, it significantly expanded to 117, an increase of 35 students (+42.7%) compared to 2025, which notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 63rd, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. Its overall TikTok popularity ranking is 52nd, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high short video exposure and some application attention. No significant negative public opinion events are found in reputation documents, and the university's image is stable. Hydraulic Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, and Environmental Science and Engineering A. Majors such as Water Conservancy, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science are highly correlated with its advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. Hohai University has offered a large number of related popular majors in Gansu Physics Category. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 147,623, an increase of approximately 21.5% compared to 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu is small (about 0.56% in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 13112, the significant 42.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), and the 21.5% increase in Gansu Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate. The M3 main value indicates a backward shift in ranking to approximately 16470. However, considering the university's 211 level, the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines like Hydraulic Engineering A+, and its relatively hot TikTok attention, the backward shift should be moderately narrowed. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 16270, with a range of 15770–16770.

Rankings better than the lower limit (<15770) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors; rankings near the upper limit (>16770) should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.
